Middleware Guards for AI Agent Tool Calls (ResearchGate, judge 0.90) is DIRECT FULL TWIN — explicit (a) pre-execution validation + (b) intent classification + (c) sandboxed execution with rollback + (d) post-execution drift auditing. AgentSpec, ProbGuard, SafeAgent, P-t-E containment, Multi-Agent Debate, capability-based routing, VeriMAP all densely cover the pre/in/post specialised role-bounded tool-call space.
